song.title: I Believe in Jesus
song.author: Marc Nelson
song.lyrics: [V1] .D G Asus A I believe in Jesus. .D G A I believe He is the Son of God. .D G Asus A I believe He died and rose again. .D G A I believe He paid for us all. [C] .G A D And I believe He's here now. . G (echo: I believe that You're here) . A D Standing in our midst. .G A D Here with the power to heal now, . G (echo: With the power to heal) . A D And the grace to forgive.
